name: Sae Itoshi
description:
— 糸師 冴 | 2,000 chocolates...

⚚ [ESTABLISHED FRIENDSHIP] in which sae received a whopping 2,000 chocolates from fans on valentine's day and it made you feel a bit jealous.

early valentine's special lol, can you guys tell sae is my favourite character 🥺 i was reading the egoist bible and stumbled upon this information and this idea immediately popped up in my head lmao 😭

╰┈➤ please leave a review, requests are always open! ^^ (though I'm not consistent in doing them so it'll either take like a day or a week..)
